name: Short-stack SPR 0.5 jam-or-fold river
description: River spot with remaining stack HALF the pot (pot=200, eff=100 = SPR 0.5). Only two interesting actions remain: check-check showdown, or jam-call / jam-fold. Any 'bet' in this spot is essentially an all-in in the bet tree (since 50% pot is half the stack, and a full-pot bet exceeds the stack and snaps to all-in). Tests the solver's handling of degenerate bet trees (one meaningful bet size = all-in). Hero = BB, villain = BTN.

input.hero_range: AA, KK, QQ, JJ, AKo, AQo, KQs, AJs
input.villain_range: 77, 88, 99, TT, JJ, AQs, AJs, KQs, QJs

expected_notes: Populated by differential run. SPR 0.5 collapses the bet tree — any bet snaps to all-in in practice. Expected: high check-back frequency with mediocre hands because jamming is committed, and polarized jam ranges on the value side.
